## What's Changed

- Fixed password-only login after enabling authentication from the web UI.
- Auth service now initializes even when login starts disabled, so login can be enabled at runtime without crashing `/api/auth/login`.
- Route protection now checks the current `login_required` setting per request instead of only at server startup.
- Removed username from the reset-password UI and API path; resetting now updates the primary direct admin password automatically.
- Added a guard so login returns a proper server error if auth is unavailable instead of panicking.

## Upgrade

Pull the latest container and restart:

```bash
docker pull ghcr.io/tatertotterson/tater-tube-server:latest
docker restart tater-tube-server
```

Keep your existing `/config`, media folder, cache, and hardware device mappings.
